changes.before: "Because you were right and nobody else could see it." ... "Her things," she said to Cyndia. "Where." "Locked room off the yard," Cyndia said from the door. "Staff, satchel, field notes, two keyed crystals, one knife."
changes.after: "Because you were right and nobody else could see it," Sylvanas said, giving the words back without emphasis. ... "Her things," she said to Cyndia, keeping her eyes on Jaina. "Where." "Locked room off the yard," Cyndia said from the door, reciting the list without stepping farther in. "Staff, satchel, field notes, two keyed crystals, one knife."
changes.rationale: The auditor flagged this interrogation run as a telegram chain. I kept the exchange clipped, but added four light connective phrases so the pressure carries across turns instead of breaking into isolated beats.

selfAuditNotes: Adjusted one connective phrase after reread so Sylvanas's head movement stayed physically precise and in character.
Rechecked the changed zone against Jaina's voice sheet: the added phrasing keeps her close-third perception without inflating the dialogue.
